name: TWIN STAR INN
detail: It’s hard to beat this level of accessibility in Taipei.
area: Taipei Main Station,Taipei - View on map

name: Caesar Park Hotel Banqiao
detail: Facilities were up to date, rooms were clean and spacious.

name: Tamsui Island Heart
detail: I was pleasantly surprised with my spacious and clean room.

name: We Come Hostel
detail: Stayed here for two nights, supposedly just for a night. The staff was really helpful to arrange me one bed for two night since my booking for two nights is two different separate booking. The hostel is just a few minutes walk from the Airport MRT. So if you are coming to other parts of Taiwan via HSR or TRA, just look for the Airport MRT and exit the Y18. From there, just go straight and turn left after the police station. To be honest, I thought that the hostel is nearer to Taipei Main Station, but it's actually nearer Beimen Station. From the hostel also, you can walk yourself going to Ximending. Their door closes at 11PM, so be sure to arrive hostel before that. Also, the place is a refurbished office space, I think. Their lobby is at 2nd floor. Breakfast also was great with coffee, bread and jams, and sometimes nuggets and fries. I must say their bed is really comfy as compared to other dorm beds I have slept in, so five star for that.

name: Tomorrow Hotel
detail: It's a wonderful hotel in Taiwan. Price, place location and room are excellent at Taipei. Hotel is located at Xiamen, which is a hot shopping area and hotel room is in the lower price around Taipei. We walk 1 minutes from mrt station to hotel. All item of living assessories are provided by the hotel even at small room and lower price.

name: Jing Cheng Youth Hostel
detail: The place is walking distance to Zhongshan Station MRT. You can also walk Taipei main station for the airport train express. The hostel offers included breakfast of ham and egg sandwich with seasonal fruits and a hot orccold drink. The reception is also cozy where you can dine or chat with friends, watch tv while surfing the web. As per the toilet and shower, it’s shared but there are enough shower and toilet rooms. You can also wash and dry your clothes with a fee; towel is also with a fee of 30NTD with a 50NTD deposit. It is a good value for money though you there is a need for air freshener in the rooms. If ever you come early or leave late for check-out, you can leave your luggages in the reception area while you can go tour aorund taiwan. Thank you strabox hostel.

name: MGH Mitsui Garden Hotel Taipei Zhongxiao
detail: I can't believe there's less than 5MB internet in the room. Nowadays internet is a must for business travelers, yet this is the worst WIFI I had around new hotels Taipei city...

name: Hotel Midtown Richardson
detail: This being my 9th trip to Taiwan, I have stayed at a number of hotels from 5 star to 3 star. I would rank this as one of the best hotels I have stayed at in Taipei. I had orgininally booked for 3 days but ended up staying a total of 6 days. The location in excellent with the Ximen MRT station exit 5 just outside the hotel. The rooms are very modern and the bed is very comfortable. This is a new hotel and there are still some renovaitons in the lower level but nothing to be a hinderence at all to your stay. I have only some very small comments to make but once again nothing to be overly concerned by. The lip on the shower floor is quite low so the water does not drain away as quick so need to be careful of the water flowing over to the floor. While ther rooms are very spacious there is no where to put your luggage except on the floor maybe the room could have a stand that you can put your luggage on. The breakfast is delivered to your room from an external supplier. Not really to my liking as it was cold. I would have preffered maybe some pastries than the american style that was delivered.. My final comment and this is not a critisicm of this hotel but of most in taiwan. I would like to see an iron and ironing board in the rooms. Overall I must say I was very impressed with this hotel and the staff. I will definately be booking this hotel again on my next trip.

name: CHECK inn Taipei Xinyi
detail: This is a great little hotel if you're a businessman going to an exhibition at the nearby World Trade Center or attending business in the Xinyi District. It is walking distance to Taipei 101 and is close to one of the night markets. If you need to travel by subway, the Taipei 101 stop is a good five minute walk away. As for the hotel, it is small but they do offer the free bottled water daily. The free breakfast is ok to mediocre at best. The eggs are runny and the sausages are under cooked. Other than that the breakfast was good enough if you want the usual coffee with toasted bread.

name: Goodmore Hotel
detail: Great stay. - near bus stops (Taiwan bus transportation is easy, google map, bus tracker taiwan is a recommended app for guides) A little walk to get to train stations (most convenient is Guting station exit 5 as it is straight walk, however if you want to explore the neighborhood, exit thru Dongmen station - shops are around these walk) Near Ximen station which we fully utilized as we go there every night to shop :D) Near most stations we often go to for sightseeing so it was super easy for us as DIY tourist The staffs are super accomodating!!!!! Just let them know of your needs, they are super nice! There is also a free breakfast buffet!!! Mind you in every night of your stay, your next day bfast is free! (Budget friendly~~) They clean and change towels every day (you have options to change sheets if you want to) They have english channels in TV, :D PS: shout out to Ms Cathy M who helps us with our wifi ordeal (we had issue with our rented wifi router from klook so they lend us wifi router for free!!!)
